implementation_notes: Top-level XML wrapper for the A2A graph. Tasks are referenced by task_id and artifacts are nested as concrete outputs.

implementation_xml:
<TaskNode task_id="T-001" status="pending" rasic_role="R" boo_binding="Luma" llm_target="claude">
  <name>string</name>
  <description>string</description>
  <inputs>
    <input>T-000</input>
    <input>artifact:id</input>
  </inputs>
  <outputs>
    <output>artifact:id</output>
  </outputs>
  <agent_card>agents/Name.md</agent_card>
  <model_id>claude-sonnet-4-20250514</model_id>
  <mcp_server>https://example.invalid/mcp</mcp_server>
  <webhook_out>https://example.invalid/webhook</webhook_out>
  <github_action>workflow-name.yml</github_action>
  <retry_policy max_attempts="3" backoff_seconds="5" />
  <timeout_seconds>300</timeout_seconds>
  <created_at>ISO8601</created_at>
  <completed_at />
</TaskNode>
implementation_notes: Single executable unit. Attributes encode routing metadata while child elements carry dependencies, outputs, and operational controls.
Portable artifact record for code, docs, config, data, or receipts produced by a task node.
Inter-agent handoff envelope. Use this row when wiring webhook dispatch or MCP relay serialization.

implementation_xml:
<LumaReceipt receipt_id="RCP-001" task_id="T-001" attested_by="Luma" status="pass">
  <assertions>
    <assertion check="output_exists" result="true" />
    <assertion check="schema_valid" result="true" />
    <assertion check="webhook_fired" result="true" />
  </assertions>
  <timestamp>ISO8601</timestamp>
  <signature />
</LumaReceipt>
implementation_notes: Completion attestation record. Intended for gating downstream workflow steps on receipt validation.
